did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that discusses and summarizes existing literature on AI in dermatology (e.g., CNNs for melanoma detection, dermoscopy, histopathology). It does not present original research where the authors used AI/ML/DL to obtain new study results; rather, it analyzes the performance and translational gaps of AI systems reported in other studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
